goal: 让 Catty PiBrain 在 provider 错误时暴露可诊断失败

summary.title: 暴露模型响应错误诊断
summary.what: 新增 Catty 模型响应抽取 helper，PiBrain 和 PiJudge 在解析 JSON 前先检查 provider error、空文本和 content block 元数据。provider 返回错误时现在直接暴露 stopReason、errorMessage、model 和 contentBlocks，而不是误报成模型没返回 JSON。
summary.why: 本轮真实 dogfood 要写入 Pi shadow 样本时，默认 grok-4-thinking 经 cliproxy/openai-completions 返回 502 unknown provider，但旧错误路径只显示空 JSON 片段，后续 agent 无法判断是模型配置、provider 兼容层还是 JSON 格式问题。这个切片让失败可诊断，同时不改变 prediction/judge/canary 协议。
summary.user_goal: 让 Catty PiBrain 在 provider 错误时暴露可诊断失败

decisions.chose: 新增 src/catty/model-response.ts，作为 PiBrain 与 PiJudge 共用的 AssistantMessage text 抽取和诊断 helper。
decisions.rationale: brain.ts 和 judge.ts 原本各自重复只抽 text block；共用 helper 能让 provider error、empty content、future block shape 的诊断保持一致。

decisions.point: 是否直接修复 provider/model 配置
decisions.chose: 不在仓库代码里硬编码可用模型；只用手动 CATTY_MODEL=gpt-5.4-mini override 完成本轮受控 shadow 写入。
decisions.rationale: 模型选择属于本机运行时 env，不应把当前可用 provider 名写死进 Catty v0；repo 里只修可诊断性。

decisions.chose: int_5b87e237/int_d0d9d89f 是 Spike B/C 基础，int_96467cf4 是 provider env alias；本轮是 error observability follow-up。
decisions.rationale: 本轮只改 model response handling，不改 trail、judge rubric、持久化 schema、canary 或 accepted-memory 协议。

rejected.alternative: 继续重试默认 envchain model 直到写入成功
rejected.reason: 根因已经是 provider 返回 502 unknown provider，盲重试只会消耗模型调用且不增加信息。

rejected.alternative: 把 grok-4-thinking 自动映射成 gpt-5.4-mini
rejected.reason: 这会把本机 provider routing 策略写进产品代码，超出 v0 小切片且可能掩盖真实配置问题。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test src/catty/model-response.test.ts；bun test src/catty/model-response.test.ts src/catty/judge.test.ts src/catty/model-env.test.ts；bun test；git diff --check；git diff --cached --check。
Focused TypeScript check：bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false | rg 'src/catty/(brain|judge|model-response)(\.test)?\.ts' 无输出；全量 tsc 仍有既有 src/catty/judge-record.ts 类型债。
真实错误 smoke：envchain mom bun src/catty/shadow.ts --pi --write 现在输出 provider returned error，包含 502 unknown provider for model grok-4-thinking。
真实 dogfood 推进：CATTY_MODEL=gpt-5.4-mini envchain mom bun src/catty/shadow.ts --pi --write 成功写入 model-backed shadow prediction；因为本线程误触发并发命令，实际写入了两个同上下文 shadow prediction，均未写 user memory、未接 heartbeat。
dogfood-health 回读：readiness 仍 blocked 在 no_user_prior_candidates，但 sampleGate 已变为 wait_for_context_switch，summary.predictions total=6、model predictions=4。
live runtime：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 为 ok，observe ok，full pipeline 上次成功，当前 throttle；CLAUDE.md 仍是无关 unstaged dirty，未 stage/commit。

subsystems: Catty v0 PiBrain model response diagnostics
Catty v0 PiJudge model response diagnostics
architectural_claims: Provider/model failure diagnosis belongs at the model-response seam before JSON parsing.
PiBrain and PiJudge keep provider credentials env-only and do not log or persist API keys.
This change does not alter Catty v0 prediction records, judgement rubric, canary state, accepted-memory flow, or heartbeat behavior.
behavioral_changes: PiBrain reports provider errors with stopReason, errorMessage, model, responseModel when present, and content block summary.
PiJudge uses the same provider error and empty-content diagnostics before parsing judgement JSON.
Empty assistant text is now reported as no text content instead of being collapsed into a JSON missing-object error.
security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, or ~/.agents/memory/config.json contents were read or logged.
Diagnostics include provider error metadata and content block sizes, not prompt text or credential values.
Manual Pi shadow writes remain explicit CLI actions and are not attached to heartbeat.
migration_notes: Existing PiBrain/PiJudge JSON parsing behavior is preserved for successful text responses.
